# PERF-008 negative: parser cached at function scope
lang: go
file: PERF-008-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"strings"
	"time"
)

var isoDate = "2006-01-02"

func ParseTimestamps(input string) []time.Time {
	out := make([]time.Time, 0)
	for _, line := range strings.Split(input, "\n") {
		t, _ := time.Parse(isoDate, line)
		out = append(out, t)
	}
	return out
}
